metadata.methodology: Quarter-Kelly (0.25×edge), 0.10% round-trip cost (prime brokerage), 4% cash yield, regime_override=ALL (bypass VIX gate), same_trigger_exemption=True
changes_from_variant_c: regime_override: True for both signals (fire in REGIME_A/B/C, VIX gate bypassed)
same_trigger_exemption: True for both signals (both GLD signals fire same day, shared slot)
